description_long: This object is a sleek, modern smartphone with a dark metallic finish and rounded edges, resembling the design language of the Apple iPhone series. The back features a prominent, centrally placed Apple logo and subtle regulatory markings near the bottom. The rear camera is located in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash. The bottom edge houses a charging port, speaker grille, and headphone jack, while the right side displays a power button and SIM tray. The left side includes volume buttons and a mute switch, all seamlessly integrated into the device's slim profile. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and glass, giving it a premium and durable appearance suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A slim, dark metallic smartphone with rounded edges, a central Apple logo on the back, and a rear camera in the top left corner. The device features integrated buttons and ports along its edges, exuding a premium, modern look.
description_view_0: The back of the phone is visible, showcasing the Apple logo, rear camera, and flash in the top left corner.
description_view_1: The bottom edge is shown, revealing the charging port, speaker grille, and headphone jack.
description_view_2: The right side is visible, highlighting the power button and SIM tray.
description_view_3: The top edge and rear camera are visible, with the Apple logo centered on the back.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible and contrasting with the dark metallic surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is not visible in any of the provided views, so no display content can be described.
attribute_camera_placement: A single rear camera lens is located in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the right edge (power button, SIM tray) and left edge (volume rocker, mute switch).
